cfg.FrontDetectionState.comment: Front Detection activation state, change when User preference menu or button or Diag tool.

cfg.RearDetectionState.comment: Rear Detection activation state, change when User preference menu or button or Diag tool.

lists.0: LED is light when UPA is OFF
lists.1: LED is light when UPA is ON
Only once in Power ON cycle

cfg.BuzzerSoundIndex.comment: Sound level index, change parameter when User preference menu or Diag tool.

lists.2: UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary)
lists.3: HFP (A.16 switch dedicated to HFP and UPA/FKP activated via Cluster/MMI)
lists.4: UPA/FKP Permanent (A.16 switch dedicated to  UPA/FKP Permanent)
lists.5: HFPB (A.16 switch dedicated to HFPB and UPA/FKP activated via Cluster/MMI)
lists.7: PSM (A.16 switch dedicated to PSM and UPA/FKP activated via Cluster/MMI)
lists.8: UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary + PSM Dedicated switch (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent/Temporary and B.10 switch Dedicated to PSM)
lists.9: UPA/FKP Permanent + PSM Dedicated switch (A.16 switch dedicated to UPA/FKP Permanent and B.10 switch Dedicated to PSM)

UPAStatusFrame.LED.comment: To read the UPA or HFP switch LED state

lists.0: the button has not been pushed yet
lists.1: the button was pushed at least one time

gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelBrakeMax.comment: Maximum level of deceleration to be achieved by braking.

gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxBrkAct.comment: Upper saturation limit of the discrete integrator.

gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxBrkCancel.comment: Upper Saturation level of BrakeCancel module's .

gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxFFD_high.comment: High value of the Maximum acceleration level provided by feedforward term..

gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMaxFFD_low.comment: Low value of the Maximum acceleration level provided by feedforward term..

gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_AccelMinPID.comment: Minimum acceleration authorized for anti-windup term (PI).

gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_EmergencyBraking.comment: Vehicle acceleration level target for emergency braking.

gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_TakeOffAccelMin.comment: Minimum acceleration outputed by the take off trategy  .

gcfg5.P_tng_mps2_VhSpdGradientSdwk.comment: Vehicle acceleration threshold when blocked against sidewalk.

gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_BrakeActivationRamp.comment: Slope of the brake's activation ramp.

gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_BrakeCancelRampSlow.comment: Smooth slope of the brakes cancel ramp.

gcfg5.P_tng_mps3_MinBrakingJerk.comment: Lower value of the rate limiter of Emergency regulation bloc.

gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_MaxPowerTrainTorque2.comment: Maximum Power train torque to be delivered by the sidewalk strategy in the first part of the strateg

gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_PWTTrqAchievblMinOptim.comment: Minimum achievable powertrain torque in motor-optim mode.

gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_PWTTrqMaxeffortSlope.comment: maximal motor torque request value for sidewalk detection.

gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_Slope_torque_low.comment: Lower slope torque limitation for PI windup calculation.

gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_Slope_torque_up.comment: Higher slope torque limitation for PI windup calculation.

gcfg5.P_tng_Nm_WheelTrqWithoutSlope.comment: Overall Minimim wheel torque without slope coponent to be consider for sidewalk blockage detection.

gcfg5.P_tng_Nmps_BrkgRqRLLowerLim.comment: Lower limit of the Rate limiter for Braking request .

gcfg5.P_tng_Nmps_EmergencyRamp.comment: Braking request ramp value for Emergency braking request.

gcfg5.P_tng_Nmps_WheelMotorTrqUpLimit.comment: Upper limit of the rate limiter for the powertrain torque request .

gcfg5.P_tng_pct_IsUpHillTh.comment: This parameter is a slope threshold over witch we determine that vehicle is going uphill.

gcfg5.P_tng_pct_SlopeTh4BrkCancel.comment: Slope threshold under witch the brake cancel phase is perform with the ramp strategy  .

gcfg5.P_tng_s_Detection_While.comment: The minimal time between setting sidewalk detection flag and clearing the sidewalk detection flag.

gcfg5.P_tng_s_DetectionTime_FS.comment: Time between real sidewalk detection and setting the sidewalk detection flag.

gcfg5.P_tng_s_ElapsedTimeConfirmed.comment: Elapsed timpe threshold for no movement detection module.

gcfg5.P_tng_s_Epsilon.comment: Minimum  error between ElapsedTime and ElapsedTimeConfirmed to switch from MOVEMENT state to WAIT_MO

gcfg5.P_tng_s_TauDerivFF.comment: Constant time for speed target low-pass filtering.

gcfg5.P_tng_s_tauSpeedControl.comment: Constant time for distance target adaptation regarding remaining distance to cover before stop.

gcfg5.P_tng_s_TempoBefore2ndTest.comment: Temporization before activating the second part of the strategy and calculate torque to be added to

gcfg5.P_tng_s_TempoBeforeRamp.comment: Temporisation before activating the take off strategie. .

gcfg5.P_tng_s_TempoVehBlockedOnsdwk.comment: Elapsed timpe after no movement detection before considering that vehicle is stuck against a sidewal

gcfg5.P_tng_s_topWaitingTime.comment: Time with no wheel encoder change to consider that vehicle is at standstill.

gcfg5.P_tng_tic_GearEngagedTime.comment: Temporization (number of clock occurrences) to wait after gear change

gcfg5.P_tng_tic_WaitEngineTime.comment: Number of clock occurrences between motor torque request and beginning of maneuver

gcfg5.P_tng_tic_WaitReleaseTime.comment: Number of clock occurrences between end of movement and VMC switch-off

gcfg5.P_tng_x_EmergencyBraking.comment: Vehicle acceleration level target for emergency braking.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_feedForwardON.comment: Parameter: activation of the feedforward strategy (switch on or switch off).

gcfg5.P_tng_x_FFDInitAccelMax.comment: Initial value of FFD maximum acceleration level target.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_FilterCoefficient.comment: Gain of the filtered derivative part of the PID controler.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_HFPB_AccelLimitChoice.comment: Factor to chose whether or not the Slope component is added to the maximum acceleration of th PI reg

gcfg5.P_tng_x_HFPB_TorqueModulation.comment: Factor to modulate higher anti-windup PI value.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_InitialValueRateLimiter.comment: Initial acceleration value of the rate limiter of Emergency regulation bloc.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_integralGain_low.comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the lowe

gcfg5.P_tng_x_Kb.comment: Gain parameter for anti wind-up term (PI).

gcfg5.P_tng_x_LowerLimitRateLimiter56.comment: Lower value of the rate limiter of Brake torque arbritation Module.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_motorOptimON.comment: Parameter: activation of an adapted powertrain control strategy on slopes (switch on - switch off).

gcfg5.P_tng_x_MotorTorqueAdapt.comment: Factor for PWT torque request adaptation.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_NumberWheelTops.comment: Number max of wheeltop for a wheel.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_proportionalBrakeGain.comment: Proportional gain of PID controler for emergengy/comfort braking regulation.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_proportionalGain_high.comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the high

gcfg5.P_tng_x_proportionalGain_low.comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the lowe

gcfg5.P_tng_x_Rapidity_Coeff.comment: Time constant of the curve of the Sidewalk torque added to the PWT request  .

gcfg5.P_tng_x_ResetRateLimiter.comment: Reset input of the rate limiter bloc.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_SideWalkStragActivation.comment: Parameter to adapt the sidewalk torque computed by the strategy .

gcfg5.P_tng_x_SideWalkStratAct.comment: Parameter to adapt the sidewalk torque computed by the strategy .

gcfg5.P_tng_x_UpperLimitRateLimiter.comment: Upper acceleration value of the rate limiter of Emergency regulation bloc.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_UpperLimitRateLimiter56.comment: Upper value of the rate limiter of Brake torque arbritation Module.

gcfg5.P_tng_x_VmaxChoice.comment: Parameter to chose beetween Parking system Vmax and configurable Vmax in the PLC.

gcfg1.4WS_VehicleEquipped.comment: Engineering config for HFP and FKP

RoutineIdentifierList.comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.

OutputPermanentControlList.comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed / blocked

lists.0: No possible classification about the type of fault
lists.20: Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
lists.21: Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

lists.1: HFP activated, HFPB deactivated, APK deactivated, PSM deactivated

P_tng_Nm_Slope_torque_low.comment: Lower slope torque limitation for PI windup calculation.

P_tng_Nm_Slope_torque_up.comment: Higher slope torque limitation for PI windup calculation.

P_tng_Nm_WheelTrqWithoutSlope.comment: Overall Minimim wheel torque without slope coponent to be consider for sidewalk blockage detection.

P_tng_Nmps_WheelMotorTrqLowLimt.comment: Lower limit of the rate limiter for the powertrain torque request  .

P_tng_Nmps_WheelMotorTrqUpLimit.comment: Upper limit of the rate limiter for the powertrain torque request .

P_tng_pct_SlopeTh4BrkCancel.comment: Slope threshold under witch the brake cancel phase is perform with the ramp strategy  .

P_tng_s_Detection_While.comment: The minimal time between setting sidewalk detection flag and clearing the sidewalk detection flag.

P_tng_s_DetectionTime_FS.comment: Time between real sidewalk detection and setting the sidewalk detection flag.

P_tng_s_ElapsedTimeConfirmed.comment: Elapsed timpe threshold for no movement detection module.

P_tng_s_TauDerivFF.comment: Constant time for speed target low-pass filtering.

P_tng_s_tauSpeedControl.comment: Constant time for distance target adaptation regarding remaining distance to cover before stop.

P_tng_s_TempoBeforeRamp.comment: Temporisation before activating the take off strategie. .

P_tng_s_topWaitingTime.comment: Time with no wheel encoder change to consider that vehicle is at standstill.

P_tng_tic_WaitEngineTime.comment: Number of clock occurrences between motor torque request and beginning of maneuver

P_tng_tic_WaitReleaseTime.comment: Number of clock occurrences between end of movement and VMC switch-off

P_tng_x_derivativeBrakeGain.comment: Derivative gain of PID controler for emergengy/comfort braking regulation.

P_tng_x_EmergencyBraking.comment: Vehicle acceleration level target for emergency braking.

P_tng_x_FFDInitAccelMax.comment: Initial value of FFD maximum acceleration level target.

P_tng_x_FilterCoefficient.comment: Gain of the filtered derivative part of the PID controler.

P_tng_x_HFPB_TorqueModulation.comment: Factor to modulate higher anti-windup PI value.

P_tng_x_InitialValueRateLimiter.comment: Initial acceleration value of the rate limiter of Emergency regulation bloc.

P_tng_x_integralBrakeGain.comment: Integral gain of PID controler for emergengy/comfort braking regulation.

P_tng_x_integralGain_high.comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the high

P_tng_x_integralGain_low.comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the lowe

P_tng_x_Kb.comment: Gain parameter for anti wind-up term (PI).

P_tng_x_motorOptimON.comment: Parameter: activation of an adapted powertrain control strategy on slopes (switch on - switch off).

P_tng_x_MotorTorqueAdapt.comment: Factor for PWT torque request adaptation.

P_tng_x_proportionalBrakeGain.comment: Proportional gain of PID controler for emergengy/comfort braking regulation.

P_tng_x_proportionalGain_high.comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the high

P_tng_x_proportionalGain_low.comment: PI regulator coefficient are interpolated regarding the distance to stop. This parameter is the lowe

P_tng_x_ResetRateLimiter.comment: Reset input of the rate limiter bloc.

P_tng_s_Epsilon.comment: Elapsed timpe threshold for no movement detection module.

cfg.BlindOutSteeringAngle.comment: defines a steering wheel angle threshold from which the filtering will be activated on FKP

DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Number of occurrence failure which has been detected for a specific DTC
